title: Read And Summarize File
description: A single file-read context block should be referenced by path and by a short content summary.
prompt: Read src/cache-policy.ts and summarize the TTL behavior in two sentences.

workspace_files.content: export function ttlForPrefix(kind: 'ephemeral_5m' | 'ephemeral_1h'): number { return kind === 'ephemeral_1h' ? 3600 : 300; } The keepalive worker should avoid refreshing one hour prefixes unless the policy explicitly enables it.
